mapper.select: select id, sign_id as signId, template_text as templateText, template_type as templateType, template_state as templateState, use_id as useId, use_web as useWeb, created, create_id as createId, updated, update_id as updateId, is_delete as isDelete, extend1, extend2, extend3, extend4 from client_template where is_delete = 0 order by sign_id asc, id asc
